channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9876] qsd_handler.c:1149:qsd_op_adjust()) ASSERTION( qqi ) failed
item.description:
Just had this happen on master-next.

[126714.209747] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == replay-dual test 9: resending a replayed create =================================================== 04:59:42 (1502528382)
[126714.554969] Turning device loop0 (0x700000) read-only
[126714.573624] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: mds1 REPLAY BARRIER on lustre-MDT0000
[126714.579805] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: local REPLAY BARRIER on lustre-MDT0000
[126715.066476] LustreError: 18967:0:(qsd_handler.c:1149:qsd_op_adjust()) ASSERTION( qqi ) failed: 
[126715.067890] LustreError: 18967:0:(qsd_handler.c:1149:qsd_op_adjust()) LBUG
[126715.068582] Pid: 18967, comm: ll_cfg_requeue
[126715.069215] 
Call Trace:
[126715.070390]  [<ffffffffa02327ce>] libcfs_call_trace+0x4e/0x60 [libcfs]
[126715.071081]  [<ffffffffa023285c>] lbug_with_loc+0x4c/0xb0 [libcfs]
[126715.071769]  [<ffffffffa09606ee>] qsd_op_adjust+0x57e/0x6b0 [lquota]
[126715.072480]  [<ffffffffa0b461a3>] osd_object_delete+0x1b3/0x270 [osd_ldiskfs]
[126715.073765]  [<ffffffffa036db1d>] lu_object_free.isra.30+0x9d/0x1a0 [obdclass]
[126715.077553]  [<ffffffffa0370fc2>] lu_object_put+0xc2/0x3d0 [obdclass]
[126715.078259]  [<ffffffffa03712e6>] lu_object_put_nocache+0x16/0x20 [obdclass]
[126715.078898]  [<ffffffffa0626a3e>] nodemap_config_set_active_mgc+0xae/0x1f0 [ptlrpc]
[126715.079793]  [<ffffffffa07b84aa>] mgc_process_recover_nodemap_log+0x2ba/0xe50 [mgc]
[126715.081157]  [<ffffffffa07b998a>] mgc_process_log+0x76a/0x890 [mgc]
[126715.081739]  [<ffffffffa023dcb7>] ? libcfs_debug_msg+0x57/0x80 [libcfs]
[126715.082235]  [<ffffffffa07bb9e0>] mgc_requeue_thread+0x2c0/0x870 [mgc]
[126715.082738]  [<ffffffff810b7cc0>] ? default_wake_function+0x0/0x20
[126715.083294]  [<ffffffffa07bb720>] ? mgc_requeue_thread+0x0/0x870 [mgc]
[126715.083788]  [<ffffffff810a2eba>] kthread+0xea/0xf0
[126715.084539]  [<ffffffff810a2dd0>] ? kthread+0x0/0xf0
[126715.085347]  [<ffffffff8170fb98>] ret_from_fork+0x58/0x90
[126715.086158]  [<ffffffff810a2dd0>] ? kthread+0x0/0xf0
[126715.086651] 
[126715.087054] Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG

tag on onyx-68 master-20170812

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
